programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Episode
programme.desc: Experts evaluate antiques and collectibles brought in by the public, revealing their history and value. Each item is assessed through storytelling, research, and on-the-spot appraisal. Hidden treasures, surprising discoveries, and emotional personal histories are uncovered throughout the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a 17th-century lantern clock, a jade necklace and a bleeding bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Rugby, Warwickshire, where the finds include a Turkish rifle

Each item is assessed through storytelling, research, and on-the-spot appraisal. Hidden treasures, surprising discoveries, and emotional personal histories are uncovered throughout the show.
